scripts.dev:infra: docker compose up -d postgres redis minio minio-init
scripts.dev:webs: concurrently -n admin,public -c green,blue "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:public"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n infra,api,admin,public -c yellow,magenta,green,blue "npm run dev:infra" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:public"
scripts.test:deep: npm run test:deep --workspace=apps/api && npm run test:deep --workspace=apps/web-admin
scripts.cap:open:admin: cd apps/web-admin && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:open:public: cd apps/web-public && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:run:admin: cd apps/web-admin && npx cap run android
scripts.cap:run:public: cd apps/web-public && npx cap run android
